subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones and My chosen ones! This Wronged One hath, through the nights and days, summoned the people unto the Most Exalted Horizon, and His purpose was that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی و اصفیائی اینمظلوم در لیالی و ایام ناس را بافق اعلی دعوت نمود و مقصود آنکه
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @suffering and imprisonment
